issues_encountered: subagent 主动用按 heading/p/li/pre 边界插换行的方式让原本单行的 HTML 抽取结果变成 891 行（Python 改进版抽取），解决了批 1 Problem 20 的「单行 L1」
原文信息量大；card body 实测 2410 chars，触发 overflow=true

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the Model Context Protocol (MCP) , an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.
HTTP servers are the recommended option for connecting to remote MCP servers.
The SSE (Server-Sent Events) transport is deprecated. Use HTTP servers instead, where available.
Output warning threshold : Claude Code displays a warning when any MCP tool output exceeds 10,000 tokens
